question: According to the chart data, which period has the larger net decrease in daily active users (DAU)?

options.B: Both periods have about the same decrease
options.C: It cannot be determined from the chart

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2010-2013: 5127 → 3406 (-1721); 2015-2018: 2043 → 784 (-1259).
